name: IntroExitCopyFit
notes: Restores the silent intro video layer, removes player-facing loading/status copy during start, improves Kakao in-app exit attempts, tightens lobby/settings/building-label copy fit, and enables plaza tap routing.
label: Silent intro, exit bridge, lobby copy fit and plaza tap route
description: Keeps loading/transition surfaces wordless while improving text fit, settings copy, building labels, popup copy boxes, and mobile in-app browser exit behavior.
